title: Nexus Portal - Innovative Web Application with Unique Visual Identity

requirements.summary: Create a visually striking landing page with unconventional, modern design breaking away from typical corporate aesthetics
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page displays with a cohesive, distinctive visual theme
Design uses contemporary layout patterns and visual hierarchy
Color palette and typography create a memorable first impression

file_operations.description: Set up router with landing page route and integrate the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png

Create landing page component featuring the hero background image (frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png), unconventional asymmetric layout with geometric shapes, and modern visual hierarchy using coral and teal color scheme
Define global design tokens including coral (#FF6B6B) and teal (#2D9CDB) color variables, modern sans-serif font stack, and base styles supporting geometric patterns and whitespace-focused layouts
Extend Tailwind configuration with custom coral and teal color palette, geometric border radius values, and spacing utilities supporting asymmetric layouts and contemporary design patterns

requirements.summary: Implement an interactive feature showcase section demonstrating dynamic content capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: User interactions provide immediate visual feedback
Content updates smoothly without page reloads

file_operations.description: Create interactive feature showcase component displaying three features with geometric icons (frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-icon-1.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-icon-2.dim_64x64.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-icon-3.dim_64x64.png), hover effects, and smooth transitions providing immediate visual feedback
Integrate FeatureShowcase component into landing page layout, positioning it within the asymmetric design flow

requirements.summary: Connect frontend to backend with React Query for seamless data fetching and mutations
acceptanceCriteria: Loading and error states display appropriately
Data updates reflect in UI immediately after mutations

file_operations.description: Create React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations (createContent, getContent, getAllContents, updateContent, deleteContent) with loading and error state management, optimistic updates, and automatic cache invalidation

Create content management page using useContentOperations hooks to display, create, update, and delete content with loading spinners and error messages, styled with coral/teal theme and geometric design elements
Add route for ContentManager page and wire it into the navigation structure

requirements.summary: Apply bold, innovative design direction featuring warm coral and deep teal tones with geometric patterns and asymmetric layouts
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses coral (#FF6B6B or similar) and teal (#2D9CDB or similar) as primary colors
Layout incorporates geometric shapes and asymmetric content placement
Typography uses modern sans-serif fonts with varied weights
Design maintains consistency across all pages and components

file_operations.description: Create layout wrapper component establishing consistent coral/teal theme, modern typography scale with varied font weights, and geometric visual patterns used across all pages
Wrap all routes with Layout component to ensure design consistency across the application
Add utility classes for geometric shapes (circles, triangles, polygons), asymmetric grid patterns, and whitespace-focused spacing that reinforce the innovative design direction
